summary: Testing of professional tab design applied to Daily Log tabs in Gates (blue theme) and Prayer Areas (emerald theme). All features verified working: rounded container, card-style tab buttons with icons in colored boxes, active state with white bg/shadow/border/accent underline, count badges, and smooth transitions.

critical_code_review_comments: DailyGateSessionsPage.jsx (Lines 351-404): Professional tab bar correctly implemented with blue theme
DailySessionsPage.jsx (Lines 603-654): Professional tab bar correctly implemented with emerald theme
Both implementations match the reference design from DepartmentSettings.jsx SettingsTabButton component

Count badges working: Gates shows gate count, Changes shows alert count in red; Prayer Areas Map shows zone count

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 tested professional tab design in Daily Logs.
